title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI coding workflow platform that integrates with GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira. Cole Medin demonstrated building a Jira adapter that automatically detects tickets, triggers bug fixes via AI, opens pull requests, and posts results back to Jira, with dedicated conversations per ticket.
